title: Introduction To Internet Of Things - Week 8
subject: Introduction To Internet Of Things

questions.question: Which architecture proposes the use of an agent placed at access points to communicate with the controller in Software Defined Mobile Networks?
Which solution was proposed by the SWAN group for mobility-aware flow rule placement in mobile-based IoT systems?
In the context of Data Center Networking using SDN, which type of flow requires exact match rules?
Cloud computing is best described as using computing as a:
Which of the following is NOT an essential characteristic of Cloud Computing?
Which deployment model is restricted to a single organization where cloud functionalities are available only within that organization?
In which service model are the Applications and Data managed by the user, while the Runtime, Middleware, and OS are managed by the provider?
Which service model allows customers to rent virtualized servers and associated services, focusing on infrastructure like networking and storage?
Which of the following is a limitation of the SaaS model?
options: c. Data security and privacy concerns
d. High switching costs for hardware

questions.question: What does SLA stand for in the context of Cloud Computing?
The "Bluepill" attack is a specific type of threat targeting which component of the cloud infrastructure?
Which term refers to the independent expectancy between two entities for a specific context at a given time?
Which of the following is a feature of the GreenCloud simulator?
options: a. It allows monitoring of energy consumption of networks and devices
b. It is a closed-source paid software
c. It is developed by Microsoft
d. It does not support GUI

questions.question: What is the primary difference between Microsoft Azure's PaaS (Platform as a Service) and IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) offerings?
options: a. PaaS is free, IaaS is paid
b. PaaS provides a development environment for clients to build apps, while IaaS offers control over OS and infrastructure
c. IaaS is for mobile only, PaaS is for web only

questions.question: Which of the following is a Java-based cloud simulation platform developed at the University of Melbourne?
